report.summary: Day 70 standup #14: Since v12, build-v12 shipped ZKML + AI Agent Identity guides (6,200 words), design-v11 fixed use-client bug on NHI page + 2 OG images + UX fixes on 4 pages, community-v11 drafted whale divergence 5-part thread + MiCA/DVT teasers + newsletter addendum. EOD-v12 confirms 1,110 page.tsx (+2), 446 slugs (+2), 174 in PUBLISH_QUEUE, 678 uncommitted files (+4). Git locks now 7.3+ days (P0). 66 agent runs today ($5,678). ZERO deployed. Recommend standup-only mode until git locks cleared.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v12: Full rotation completed — build-v12, design-v11, community-v11, eod-v12 all ran. Zero commits, zero deploys. Git locks 7.3+ days.

BUILD-V12 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — ZKML Guide 2026 (~3,200 words, 860 lines, ezkl/Giza/DeepProve coverage, ZKML+FHE convergence, cost below $0.001/proof) and AI Agent Identity & NHI Guide (~3,000 words, 768 lines, NHIs outnumber humans 96:1, World AgentKit, x402 protocol, KYA standards). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE batch 11.

DESIGN-V11 OUTPUT: Fixed critical 'use client'+metadata bug on ai-agent-identity-nhi page (extracted InteractiveTOC.tsx + InteractiveCards.tsx client components). 2 new OG images (ZKML neural network viz, NHI agent identity node diagram). Added Breadcrumb+StructuredData to smart-contract-security + onchain-identity pages. Responsive typography clamp() on 4 pages. Server component event handler fix on smart-contract-security.

COMMUNITY-V11 OUTPUT: 5-part Whale vs Retail Divergence thread (270K BTC vs F&G 10, 150-400% historical rally pattern). MiCA EU regulation teaser. DVT staking teaser. Monday evening recap. Discord/TG evening update. Newsletter v6 addendum for MiCA+DVT. Whale Divergence social card (1200x630 SVG). Content calendar v8 now 15+ posts Mon-Sun.

EOD-V12 FINDING: 1,110 page.tsx (+2 since v11). 446 published slugs (+2). 341/446 have dedicated page.tsx. 174 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE. 678 uncommitted changes (+4). 42 TS errors unchanged. 1 use-client bug FIXED (NHI), 2 remain (unichain, appchains). 0/6 core routes have rate limiter.

MARKET CONTEXT: BTC ~$68K (volatile). ETH ~$2,057. F&G 10 (Extreme Fear, Day 47+). RSI 27 (deeply oversold). Whale accumulation 270K BTC (13-yr high, $23B). Exchange supply 2.7M BTC (6-yr low). $243M long liquidations 24h. CLARITY Act complicated by bank deregulation rider.

SEO RISK: 7+ days without deploy. ~131+ built pages not live in production. 6+ premium guides (MiCA, DVT, Flash Loans, DeFi Vaults, ZKML, AI Agent Identity) trapped behind git locks. Extreme Fear market = peak organic search window being missed.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v12: Build-v12 (ZKML + AI Agent Identity guides), design-v11 (2 OG images + 4-page UX audit + use-client fix), community-v11 (whale divergence thread + MiCA/DVT teasers + newsletter addendum), eod-v12 (QA cycle). 4 agents + this standup = 5 runs, $442 human-equivalent.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 24+ learn guides built, 18+ OG images, 42+ social posts + 16 SVG cards, 12 QA cycles, 11 design audits, 66 agent runs across ~11 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7+ DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.
PROGRESS: design-v11 FIXED 1 of 3 use-client+metadata bugs (ai-agent-identity-nhi). 2 remain: unichain-guide-2026, appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing cache AND fallback data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts + 2 in crypto-index-funds page (masked by ignoreBuildErrors).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs without page.tsx, 122/176 learn pages missing OG images, server component event handlers may exist on other pages.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 174 pages queued for promotion. Build cycles continue generating content with no deploy path.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 7+ days blocked. 678 uncommitted files at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commit → push → verify Vercel auto-deploy. This is the ONLY priority that unblocks value.

PRIORITY 2 — HALT ALL BUILD AND DESIGN CYCLES: 446 slugs declared, ~315 in production. Publish queue at 174 pages. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 131+ pages. Building more guides = pure waste until deploy gap is closed.

PRIORITY 3 — STANDUP-ONLY MODE UNTIL DEPLOY: Recommend running ONLY standup agent. All other agents burn $452/rotation with zero path to production. Today: $5,678 human-equivalent with nothing reaching users.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 66 agent runs today ($5,678 human-equivalent) with zero reaching production. 6 premium guides (MiCA, DVT, Flash Loans, DeFi Vaults, ZKML, AI Agent Identity) are high-value SEO assets stuck behind a single-command fix. Whale divergence narrative (270K BTC accumulation vs F&G 10) is the strongest bull signal since 2020 — missing the organic search window for these topics.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $5,678 (66 runs: standup×13 $585, build×12 $2,796, publish×7 $385, design×11 $660, community×11 $451, eod×12 $756)
